title: Dinosaur Throw Blanket for Boys & toddler, Soft and Warm Dino Flannel Blanket, Lightweight Cozy Fleece Blankets for Bed Sofa Couch (Stegosaurus, Dimetrodon, Velociraptor) - 75X100 cm
features: Material: Fleece bed blanket is made of ultra-soft microfiber polyester, brings you more breathable and lightweight, it's wrinkle and fade resistant, anti-pilling, and is suitable for all seasons.

Different Sizes: The throw blanket are 4 sizes, 75X100/ 100X 125/ 125X 150/ 150X 200 cm, please choose the size you need according to your actual situation. Not only for kids, but also for boys, girls and aldult.

Versatile: Enjoying happy and leisure hours, as a travel blanket, convenient to carry when camping outdoors, backpacking, rv trips or on a picnic. Fleece blanket for the living room, reading book, watching TV, relaxing in your living room, bedroom.

Best Gift: Sofa blanket works great as a thoughtful gift for holidays, birthdays and get well gifts, plus much more. This flannel blanket is perfect for Halloween, Christmas, New Year, birthdays or any festive occasion.

Easy to Clean and Maintain: Wash with cold or warm water. It must be dried at low temperature to maintain the quality and color of the soft blanket and make the blanket more durable. It is recommended that you clean the throw blanket before using it for the first time.
description: Blankets is made of premium flannel, this flannel throw blanket is wrinkle and fade resistant and doesn't shed! Super soft, durable, warm and lightweight. Curl up on your sofa while enjoying some reading or a good movie, and let this fleece blanket wrap your body in warmth and coziness. Perfect for you to snuggle with while watching Tv on the couch, or relaxing on your sofa and bed. Great for couch, sofa, bed, carseat, office, picnic, camping, backpacking, beach, travel, airplane and other indoor outdoor occasions. Plenty of room to wrap around most baby and kids. It is a great gift for your friends and family, even pets love it! Package Include: 1 X Throw Blanket Size: 100X 125 cm, suitable for baby and kids 125X 150 cm, suitable for teens 150X 200 cm, suitable for aldult The fleece blanket is good ideal for watching movies on cold nights. Which can bring softness and warmth to children and family four seasons of year, and keep you comfortable and warm all day.
